meta.title: GitHub Roast | Score Developers & Discover the Best
meta.description: Drop a GitHub handle for a 0-100 value & trust score and a savage roast in 30 seconds — then browse the leaderboard to discover the best developers worth following. Built to expose PR farmers, AI bots, and fork-hoarders. githubroast.dev
meta.ogTitle: GitHub Roast | Score Developers & Discover the Best
meta.ogDescription: Score any GitHub account and discover top developers. 0-100 value & trust score + a savage roast in 30 seconds, plus a ranked developer leaderboard.
meta.twDescription: Score any GitHub dev + discover the best on the leaderboard. 0-100 score & savage roast in 30s.

repoLink.label: Source
repoLink.title: Source code & scoring algorithm are open source · View on GitHub

home.subtitle: Score yourself · Discover the best developers
home.tagline: Drop a GitHub handle for a 0–100 value & trust score and a savage roast — then browse the Hall of Fame to discover the developers worth following.
home.disclaimer1: Scores and roasts are generated automatically from public GitHub data only. We roast an account's public behavior and stats, not the person. Results are not factual claims about anyone — please don't use them to harass.
home.disclaimer2: The scoring core is open-sourced as the github-account-value skill · your own API key stays in your browser only.

leaderboard.heading: 🏆 Hall of Fame
leaderboard.subtitle: The Hall of Fame lists accounts scoring 60+, defaulting to Trending.
leaderboard.footerNote: Only high-scoring accounts built from public GitHub data are listed. To remove yourself from the board, request removal here.
leaderboard.loadError: Couldn't load the board right now — try again later.
leaderboard.empty: 🧮 Crunching the numbers — check back soon…
leaderboard.trendTitle: Trend score: 80% score + 15% unique 7-day visitor heat + 5% recent lookup decay
leaderboard.scoreTitle: 0-100 value and trust score based on public GitHub data
leaderboard.trendSubtitle: Trend blends score, unique 7-day visitor heat, and recent lookup recency; heat is normalized so raw attention cannot overwhelm quality.
leaderboard.scoreSubtitle: Ranked by the 0-100 value and trust score.
leaderboard.heatSubtitle: Ranked by total successful roast lookups.
leaderboard.progressSubtitle: Climb from your last scan to make the board.
leaderboard.progressEmpty: 🧮 Crunching the numbers — check back soon…

detail.roastEmpty: This roast hasn't been archived yet — judge again from the home page to generate it.

detailMeta.title: {username} — {score}/100 · {tier} | Savage GitHub Roast
detailMeta.descWithTags: {tags} — see {username}'s full score report on githubroast.dev.
detailMeta.notFoundTitle: Account not found · Savage GitHub Roast

roaster.inputPlaceholder: Enter a GitHub username or profile URL
roaster.byoLink: Use your own model / API key
roaster.scanning: Digging up {username}'s history… reading commits, checking PRs, counting stars, sniffing out farmed activity
roaster.roastThinking: The AI is cooking up a savage roast — coming right up…
roaster.firstJudged: 🥇 You're the first to be judged — a true pioneer
roaster.beatLine: <hl>🏆 Beat {beat}%</hl><muted> of developers ({total} judged so far)</muted>
roaster.privateNote: Note: the score uses public signals only — private contributions don't count, so active members of private orgs may be underrated.
roaster.shareText: My GitHub just got judged: {score}/100 · {tier} ({tierLabel}){beat}. Rate yours 👉 githubroast.dev
roaster.errNeedTurnstile: Please complete the verification below first.
roaster.errRoastFailed: Roast generation failed — try again later or use your own key.
roaster.errNetworkRoast: Connection dropped — the roast got cut off.
roaster.errNetworkScan: Network error — couldn't even reach GitHub.
roaster.byoReasonQuota: Free quota's used up 😵 Add your own API key to keep roasting (OpenAI / StepFun / Groq all work).
roaster.byoReasonRate: You've roasted a lot today 🥵 Take a breather, or add your own API key for unlimited roasts.
roaster.byoReasonDefault: No default model is configured on the server — add your own API key to start roasting.

scanErrors.invalid_username: That doesn't look like a GitHub username — double-check it?
scanErrors.turnstile_failed: Verification failed — refresh the page and retry.
scanErrors.rate_limited: Too fast — take a breath and try again in a minute.
scanErrors.github_rate_limited: GitHub's API is maxed out right now — give it a moment.
scanErrors.scan_failed: The scan crashed — try again later.

badge.heading: 📌 Pin to your GitHub profile
badge.blurb: Copy any snippet below into your Profile README. The score stays up to date automatically, and the image links to your detail page.

byok.title: Use your own model
byok.compatNote: Works with any OpenAI-compatible API (OpenAI / OpenRouter / Groq / DeepSeek / local). Your key stays in your own browser. It's relayed once through our server to call the model, but never stored, never logged, discarded after use.
byok.tempKeyNote: 🔒 If you're concerned, use a temporary / spend-limited key and revoke it when you're done.

developerCount: <n>{count, number}</n> developers have entered the arena ⚔️

shareCard.brand: 🔥 Savage GitHub Roast · see how you stack up
